---
title: "Fundamentos de Análisis de Datos con R"
author: "Prof. Pedro L. Luque"
lang: es
date: today
date-format: full
format:
  memoriatfetypst-typst:
    metadata:
      formato-typst-a4: true
      es-memoria: true
      es-slides: false
    portada: false
    centrar-matematicas: true
    toc: false
    toccapitulos: true
    toc-depth: 5
    cabecera-capitulo: "estilo03"
    nombre-capitulo: "--"
    papersize: a4
    margin: {x: 1.5cm, y: 1.5cm}
    keep-typ: true
    fig-format: png
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        #let centrado(it) = text(it)
    include-before-body:
      text: |
        #show table: it => align(center, it)
    filters:
      - fontsize-noop.lua
      - eliminar-separadores.lua
  html:
    metadata:
      es-memoria: false
      es-slides: false
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.width: 10
    fig.height: 8
    dpi: 300
filters:
  - color-spans-typst.lua
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
bibliography: referencias.bib
---

```{=typst}
#show link: set text(fill: orange)
#show ref: set text(fill: rgb("#cc0066"))
```

{{< include _contenido.qmd >}}
